title: Potion of Healing
summary: A vial of red liquid that restores 2d4+2 hit points when consumed.
content:
## Potion of Healing

*Potion, common*

You regain **2d4 + 2** hit points when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

**Cost:** 50 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

### Usage

Drinking a potion requires an **action**. Alternatively, some DMs allow administering a potion to another creature as an action.

### Variant Rule: Potions as Bonus Action

A common house rule allows drinking a potion as a **bonus action** instead of an action, to encourage their use in combat.

title: Potion of Greater Healing
summary: A potion that restores 4d4+4 hit points when consumed.
content:
## Potion of Greater Healing

*Potion, uncommon*

You regain **4d4 + 4** hit points when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

**Cost:** 100–150 gp (varies by market)
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Superior Healing
summary: A potion that restores 8d4+8 hit points when consumed.
content:
## Potion of Superior Healing

*Potion, rare*

You regain **8d4 + 8** hit points when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

**Cost:** 500–750 gp (varies by market)
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Supreme Healing
summary: A potion that restores 10d4+20 hit points when consumed.
content:
## Potion of Supreme Healing

*Potion, very rare*

You regain **10d4 + 20** hit points when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

**Cost:** 5,000–10,000 gp (varies by market)
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Animal Friendship
summary: A potion that lets you cast Animal Friendship (DC 13) for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Animal Friendship

*Potion, uncommon*

When you drink this potion, you can cast the **Animal Friendship** spell (save DC 13) at will for **1 hour**.

Agitating this muddy liquid brings little bits into view: a ## fish scale, a ## hummingbird tongue, a cat claw, or a squirrel hair.

**Cost:** ~200 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Clairvoyance
summary: A potion that grants the effect of the Clairvoyance spell for 10 minutes.
content:
## Potion of Clairvoyance

*Potion, rare*

When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the **Clairvoyance** spell. An eyeball bobs in this yellowish liquid but vanishes when the potion is opened.

**Duration:** 10 minutes (concentration not required)
**Cost:** ~500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Diminution
summary: A potion that shrinks the drinker as if affected by the Reduce effect of Enlarge/Reduce.
content:
## Potion of Diminution

*Potion, rare*

When you drink this potion, you gain the **Reduce** effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for **1d4 hours** (no concentration required). The red in the potion's liquid continuously contracts to a tiny bead and then expands to color the clear liquid around it.

**Effects:**
- Your size decreases by one category (e.g., Medium to Small)
- Disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws
- Your weapons deal 1d4 less damage (minimum 1)

**Cost:** ~500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Fire Breath
summary: A potion that grants the ability to exhale fire as a bonus action for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Fire Breath

*Potion, uncommon*

After drinking this potion, you can use a **bonus action** to exhale fire at a target within **30 feet**. The target must make a **DC 13 Dexterity saving throw**, taking **4d6 fire damage** on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. The effect ends after you exhale fire **three times** or when **1 hour** has passed.

This potion's orange liquid flickers, and smoke fills the top of the container and wafts out whenever it is opened.

**Cost:** ~200 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Flying
summary: A potion that grants a flying speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Flying

*Potion, very rare*

When you drink this potion, you gain a **flying speed** equal to your walking speed for **1 hour** and can hover. If you're in the air when the potion wears off, you fall unless you have some other means of staying aloft.

This potion's clear liquid floats at the top of its container and has cloudy white impurities drifting in it.

**Cost:** ~5,000 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Gaseous Form
summary: A potion that transforms the drinker into a misty cloud for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Gaseous Form

*Potion, rare*

When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the **Gaseous Form** spell for **1 hour** (no concentration required) or until you end the effect as a bonus action.

This potion's container seems to hold fog that moves and pours like water.

**Effects while gaseous:**
- Flying speed of 10 feet, can hover
- Resistance to nonmagical damage
- Can pass through tiny holes and cracks
- Can't attack, cast spells, or manipulate objects
- Advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws

**Cost:** ~500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Hill Giant Strength
summary: A potion that sets the drinker's Strength score to 21 for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Hill Giant Strength

*Potion, uncommon*

When you drink this potion, your **Strength score changes to 21** for **1 hour**. The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is already equal to or greater than that score.

This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a hill giant.

**Cost:** ~200 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Frost Giant Strength
summary: A potion that sets the drinker's Strength score to 23 for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Frost Giant Strength

*Potion, rare*

When you drink this potion, your **Strength score changes to 23** for **1 hour**. The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is already equal to or greater than that score.

This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a frost giant.

**Cost:** ~500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Stone Giant Strength
summary: A potion that sets the drinker's Strength score to 23 for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Stone Giant Strength

*Potion, rare*

When you drink this potion, your **Strength score changes to 23** for **1 hour**. The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is already equal to or greater than that score.

This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a stone giant.

**Cost:** ~500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Fire Giant Strength
summary: A potion that sets the drinker's Strength score to 25 for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Fire Giant Strength

*Potion, rare*

When you drink this potion, your **Strength score changes to 25** for **1 hour**. The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is already equal to or greater than that score.

This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a fire giant.

**Cost:** ~500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Cloud Giant Strength
summary: A potion that sets the drinker's Strength score to 27 for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Cloud Giant Strength

*Potion, very rare*

When you drink this potion, your **Strength score changes to 27** for **1 hour**. The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is already equal to or greater than that score.

This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a cloud giant.

**Cost:** ~5,000 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Storm Giant Strength
summary: A potion that sets the drinker's Strength score to 29 for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Storm Giant Strength

*Potion, legendary*

When you drink this potion, your **Strength score changes to 29** for **1 hour**. The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is already equal to or greater than that score.

This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a storm giant.

**Cost:** ~50,000+ gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Growth
summary: A potion that causes the drinker to grow as if affected by the Enlarge effect of Enlarge/Reduce.
content:
## Potion of Growth

*Potion, uncommon*

When you drink this potion, you gain the **Enlarge** effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for **1d4 hours** (no concentration required). The red in the potion's liquid continuously expands from a tiny bead to color the clear liquid around it and then contracts.

**Effects:**
- Your size doubles in all dimensions; weight multiplies by eight
- Your size increases by one category (e.g., Medium to Large)
- Advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws
- Your weapons deal 1d4 extra damage

**Cost:** ~200 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Heroism
summary: A potion that grants 10 temporary hit points and the Bless effect for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Heroism

*Potion, rare*

For **1 hour** after drinking it, you gain **10 temporary hit points** that last for 1 hour. For the same duration, you are under the effect of the **Bless** spell (no concentration required).

This blue potion bubbles and steams as if boiling.

**Bless effect:** You can add a d4 to every attack roll and saving throw for the duration.

**Cost:** ~500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Invisibility
summary: A potion that makes the drinker invisible for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Invisibility

*Potion, very rare*

This potion's container looks empty but feels as though it holds liquid. When you drink it, you become **invisible** for **1 hour**. Anything you wear or carry is invisible with you. The effect ends early if you **attack** or **cast a spell**.

**Cost:** ~5,000 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Mind Reading
summary: A potion that grants the effect of the Detect Thoughts spell.
content:
## Potion of Mind Reading

*Potion, rare*

When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the **Detect Thoughts** spell (save DC 13). This potion's dense, purple liquid has an ovoid cloud of pink floating in it.

**Duration:** Concentration, up to 1 minute
**Save DC:** 13 (Wisdom)

**Cost:** ~500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Poison
summary: A deceptive potion that appears to be a healing potion but poisons the drinker.
content:
## Potion of Poison

*Potion, uncommon*

This concoction looks, smells, and tastes like a **Potion of Healing** or other beneficial potion. However, it is actually poison masked by illusion magic. An **Identify** spell reveals its true nature.

If you drink it, you take **3d6 poison damage** and must succeed on a **DC 13 Constitution saving throw** or be **poisoned**. At the start of each of your turns while poisoned in this way, you take 3d6 poison damage. At the end of each of your turns, you can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

**Cost:** ~100 gp (typically sold covertly)
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Resistance
summary: A potion that grants resistance to one type of damage for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Resistance

*Potion, uncommon*

When you drink this potion, you gain **resistance** to one type of damage for **1 hour**. The DM chooses or randomly determines the type.

| d10 | Damage Type |
|-----|-------------|
| 1 | Acid |
| 2 | Cold |
| 3 | Fire |
| 4 | Force |
| 5 | Lightning |
| 6 | Necrotic |
| 7 | Poison |
| 8 | Psychic |
| 9 | Radiant |
| 10 | Thunder |

**Cost:** ~200 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Speed
summary: A potion that grants the effect of the Haste spell for 1 minute.
content:
## Potion of Speed

*Potion, very rare*

When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the **Haste** spell for **1 minute** (no concentration required). The potion's yellow fluid is streaked with black and swirls on its own.

**Effects:**
- Speed is doubled
- +2 bonus to AC
- Advantage on Dexterity saving throws
- One additional action per turn (Attack [one weapon attack only], Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object)

**Warning:** When the effect ends, you can't move or take actions until after your next turn, as a wave of lethargy sweeps over you.

**Cost:** ~5,000 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Potion of Water Breathing
summary: A potion that grants the ability to breathe underwater for 1 hour.
content:
## Potion of Water Breathing

*Potion, uncommon*

You can **breathe underwater** for **1 hour** after drinking this potion. Its cloudy green fluid smells of the sea and has a jellyfish-like bubble floating in it.

**Cost:** ~200 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Oil of Etherealness
summary: An oil that transports the coated creature to the Ethereal Plane for 1 hour.
content:
## Oil of Etherealness

*Potion (oil), rare*

Beads of this cloudy gray oil form on the outside of its container and quickly evaporate. The oil can cover a **Medium or smaller creature**, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying (one additional action is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil takes **10 minutes**.

The affected creature then gains the effect of the **Etherealness** spell for **1 hour**.

**Cost:** ~1,500 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Oil of Sharpness
summary: An oil that gives a weapon or ammunition a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls for 1 hour.
content:
## Oil of Sharpness

*Potion (oil), very rare*

This clear, gelatinous oil sparkles with tiny, ultrathin silver shards. The oil can coat one **slashing or piercing weapon** or up to **5 pieces of slashing or piercing ammunition**. Applying the oil takes **1 minute**.

For **1 hour**, the coated item gains a **+3 bonus to attack and damage rolls**.

**Cost:** ~5,000 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Oil of Slipperiness
summary: An oil that grants the Freedom of Movement effect or can be poured to replicate Grease.
content:
## Oil of Slipperiness

*Potion (oil), uncommon*

This sticky black unguent is thick and heavy in the container, but it flows quickly when poured. The oil can cover a **Medium or smaller creature**, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying (one additional action is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil takes **10 minutes**.

The affected creature then gains the effect of a **Freedom of Movement** spell for **8 hours**.

Alternatively, the oil can be poured on the ground as an action, where it covers a **10-foot square**, duplicating the effect of the **Grease** spell in that area for **8 hours**.

**Cost:** ~200 gp
**Weight:** 0.5 lb.

title: Spell Scrolls
summary: Single-use magical scrolls containing a spell that can be cast without components.
content:
## Spell Scrolls

A **spell scroll** bears the words of a single spell, written in a mystical cipher. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast its spell without providing any material components. Otherwise, the scroll is unintelligible.

### Casting from a Scroll

- If the spell is on your class's spell list but of a higher level than you can normally cast, you must make an **ability check** using your spellcasting ability (DC = 10 + the spell's level). On a failure, the spell disappears from the scroll with no effect.
- The spell's casting time remains the same.
- Once the spell is cast, the words on the scroll fade and it crumbles to dust.

### Save DCs and Attack Bonuses by Spell Level

| Spell Level | Save DC | Attack Bonus | Rarity |
|-------------|---------|--------------|--------|
| Cantrip | 13 | +5 | Common |
| 1st | 13 | +5 | Common |
| 2nd | 13 | +5 | Uncommon |
| 3rd | 15 | +7 | Uncommon |
| 4th | 15 | +7 | Rare |
| 5th | 17 | +9 | Rare |
| 6th | 17 | +9 | Very Rare |
| 7th | 18 | +10 | Very Rare |
| 8th | 18 | +10 | Very Rare |
| 9th | 19 | +11 | Legendary |

### Approximate Costs

| Spell Level | Cost |
|-------------|------|
| Cantrip | 25 gp |
| 1st | 75 gp |
| 2nd | 150 gp |
| 3rd | 300 gp |
| 4th | 500 gp |
| 5th | 1,000 gp |
| 6th | 5,000 gp |
| 7th | 10,000 gp |
| 8th | 25,000 gp |
| 9th | 50,000 gp |

### Wizard Copying

A wizard can copy a spell from a spell scroll into their spellbook. The usual gold and time costs apply, and the scroll is destroyed whether the copying succeeds or fails.

title: +1 Ammunition
summary: Magical ammunition with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
content:
## +1 Ammunition

*Weapon (any ammunition), uncommon*

You have a **+1 bonus to attack and damage rolls** made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical.

Typically found or sold in bundles of **10–20 pieces**.

**Cost:** ~25 gp per piece (or ~250–500 gp per bundle)
**Weight:** Varies by type (arrows 1 lb./20, bolts 1.5 lb./20, sling bullets 1.5 lb./20)

title: +2 Ammunition
summary: Magical ammunition with a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
content:
## +2 Ammunition

*Weapon (any ammunition), rare*

You have a **+2 bonus to attack and damage rolls** made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical.

Typically found or sold in bundles of **5–10 pieces**.

**Cost:** ~100 gp per piece (or ~500–1,000 gp per bundle)
**Weight:** Varies by type

title: +3 Ammunition
summary: Magical ammunition with a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
content:
## +3 Ammunition

*Weapon (any ammunition), very rare*

You have a **+3 bonus to attack and damage rolls** made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical.

Typically found or sold in bundles of **1–5 pieces**.

**Cost:** ~500 gp per piece (or ~1,000–2,500 gp per bundle)
**Weight:** Varies by type

title: Arrow of Slaying
summary: A magical arrow designed to slay a specific type of creature, dealing an extra 6d10 piercing damage.
content:
## Arrow of Slaying

*Weapon (arrow), very rare*

An **Arrow of Slaying** is a magic weapon meant to slay a particular kind of creature. Some are more narrow in their purpose (such as **dragon slaying arrows**), while others target a broader group (such as **aberration slaying arrows**).

If a creature belonging to the type, race, or group associated with an Arrow of Slaying takes damage from the arrow, the creature must make a **DC 17 Constitution saving throw**, taking an extra **6d10 piercing damage** on a failed save, or half as much extra damage on a successful one.

Once the arrow deals its extra damage, it becomes a nonmagical arrow.

### Common Variants

- Arrow of Dragon Slaying
- Arrow of Fiend Slaying
- Arrow of Undead Slaying
- Arrow of Giant Slaying
- Arrow of Aberration Slaying

**Cost:** ~2,500–5,000 gp each
**Weight:** 0.05 lb.
